name: poselib
description: Minimal solvers for calibrated camera pose estimation. Pinned to cdcseacave/PoseLib commit ccdd2f62d7ee91b41a1dce4dfd619b688b6c247a from feature/spherical-camera-support, with unified bearing-vector estimate_* API for pinhole and spherical (equirectangular) cameras; opt.max_error is angular (radians) for the bearing estimators.
